title: NOTICE OF OFFICE CLOSURE-19 (PDF)
text:
NOTICE OF OFFICE CLOSURE
This notice serves to inform industry and all
clients of the Vanuatu Financial Services
Commission that the Companies House will be
closed for business on Friday, 27th December
2019.
We apologize for any inconvenience this may
cause. The Companies House will be open
again for business on Monday, 30th December
2019
We thank you for your continued support and
understanding.
Yours Sincerely,
Branan Karae
Commissioner
